text: The department may, but shall not be required to, provide patrol or enforce the provisions of Section 23152 for offenses which occur other than upon a highway.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 12. Public Offenses [23100 - 23249.50]
#### Article 2. Offenses Involving Alcohol and Drugs [23152 - 23229.1]
##### § 23215

The department may, but shall not be required to, provide patrol or enforce the provisions of Section 23152 for offenses which occur other than upon a highway.

*(Added by Stats. 1981, Ch. 940, Sec. 32.)*

subsections.text: The department may, but shall not be required to, provide patrol or enforce the provisions of Section 23152 for offenses which occur other than upon a highway.
